name: Ƙirjin allura (NCD)
description: Taimakon gaggawa na tashin hankali pneumothorax ta hanyar shigar da allura cikin sararin intercostal na biyu. Shisshigi mai ceton rai.
steps: Gano tashin hankali pneumothorax: rashi numfashi sautuka a gefen abin ya shafa, tracheal sabawa (marigayi), damuwa na numfashi, hypotension, JVD.
Fitar da kirji a gefen da abin ya shafa.
Gano wuri na intercostal na 2, layin tsakiya (madadin: 4th/5th ICS, layin axillary na gaba).
Saka 14g, 3.25-inch allura-catheter perpendicular zuwa bangon kirji, kusa da TOP na haƙarƙari na 3 (yana guje wa dam ɗin neurovascular).
Ci gaba har sai an ji saurin iska ko kuma a ji sauti.
Cire allurar kuma bar catheter a wurin.
Saurari don inganta sautin numfashi da ƙoƙarin numfashi.
Tabbatar da cibiyar catheter. KADA KA matsa ko rufe ƙarshen buɗewa.
Sake tantance kowane minti 5 -- catheter na iya yin kink ko gudan jini, yana buƙatar maimaita raguwa.
warnings: Yi amfani da allura mai inci 3.25 - daidaitaccen 14g angiocatheter (1.5in) akai-akai yana kasawa a cikin marasa lafiya na soja saboda makamai na jiki da tsoka.
Ana iya buƙatar NCD na biyu idan ba a tabbatar da wane ɓangaren abin ya shafa ba kuma an kama majiyyaci.
Kada a sanya gefe ɗaya da tsotsan raunin ƙirji ba tare da rufe raunin ba.

pediatric.note: Yi amfani da allura mai girman da ya dace (ƙananan marasa lafiya, 1.5-2in na iya isa). Yi amfani da hanyar ICS MCL ta biyu. Gane alamar ƙasa ya fi wahala -- yi amfani da hankali.
